product_overview: A Next.js dashboard for the Caleb autonomous DCA trading agent that lets visitors browse live trade sessions, inspect the agent's 5-step cryptographic audit trail, verify hashes on-chain, and (when wallet-connected) configure a policy or submit attestations.
core_goals: Browse a live, auto-refreshing feed of recent trading sessions and inspect session summaries
Drill into a session to read the agent's reasoning and see the full 5-step audit timeline
Verify session step hashes against on-chain commitments to confirm integrity
View portfolio value, P&L and recent trade history
Connect a wallet to configure a personal trading policy and submit attestations for sessions

features.name: Live Trade Feed
features.description: A continuously polled list of recent trading sessions grouped by day with compact session summaries and the ability to expand the feed to older sessions.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View agent status indicator and stats bar -> Browse session cards in the trade feed -> See verdict, token, confidence, and amount on session cards -> Expand feed to reveal older sessions
Navigate to / -> Browse session cards in the trade feed -> Click a session card to navigate to session detail

features.name: Portfolio Summary
features.description: At-a-glance portfolio value, aggregated P&L, holdings overview and a recent trade history with links to session proofs.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View portfolio value card with total value and P&L -> View holdings summary and open positions -> View trade history entries with token, side, amount, and P&L -> Use trade proof links to navigate from a trade entry to the session detail

features.name: Session Detail and Audit Timeline
features.description: Full session view exposing session metadata, the 5-step audit timeline (POLICY, MARKET, DECISION, CHECK, EXECUTION), expandable reasoning for each step and raw JSON payload inspection.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click a session card to navigate to session detail -> View session metadata (ID, timestamp, verdict) -> Expand each audit step to read the agent's reasoning -> View raw JSON payload via the disclosure control -> Copy a step hash to clipboard -> Return to the feed

features.name: On-chain Verification
features.description: Trigger a verification run that compares each step's computed hash to the on-chain commitment and surface per-step match/mismatch badges.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click a session card to navigate to session detail -> Initiate on-chain verification for the session -> View per-step verification badges (match/mismatch) for the 5-step timeline

features.name: Attestations
features.description: View existing attestations for a session and, when wallet-connected, submit an independent attestation that is recorded on-chain.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click a session card to navigate to session detail -> View attestation count and list for the session -> If already wallet-connected, submit an attestation and see the attestation list refresh
Navigate to / -> Click a session card to navigate to session detail -> Attempt to attest without a connected wallet -> See a prompt to connect a wallet before attesting

features.name: Wallet Connection
features.description: Connect or disconnect a crypto wallet to reveal the connected address and testnet INIT balance; wallet connection gates policy editing and attestation submission.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Initiate wallet connection -> See wallet address and INIT balance displayed in the header and user balance card -> Disconnect wallet to return to guest state

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Charts and stat cards for portfolio analytics including cumulative P&L, portfolio value liveline, verdict distribution, and confidence histogram.
user_flows: Navigate to /analytics -> View stat cards (total P&L, portfolio value, win rate, trades) -> Inspect cumulative P&L liveline chart -> Inspect portfolio value liveline chart -> Inspect decision breakdown pie chart -> Inspect confidence distribution bar chart

features.name: Strategy Configuration
features.description: View and edit per-address policy settings (strategy, max spend, confidence threshold, cooldown, allowed tokens, drawdown limits); saving is gated by wallet connection.
user_flows: Navigate to /strategy -> Connect wallet when prompted -> View current policy settings for the connected address -> Edit policy fields (max spend, confidence threshold, cooldown, allowed tokens) -> Save updated policy -> See the updated policy reflected in the UI

Navigate to /strategy -> Connect wallet when prompted -> Edit policy fields -> Enter an invalid value (for example a negative max spend) -> Attempt to save updated policy -> See a validation error and remain on the form to correct input

routes.description: Home dashboard with agent status, stats, live trade feed, and portfolio summary
Session detail page with 5-step audit timeline, verification, and attestations
Analytics dashboard with P&L charts, portfolio value, verdict breakdown, confidence histogram
API proxy for session verification against on-chain data
API proxy for fetching session attestations

features.name: Live Trade Feed
features.description: Real-time feed of trading sessions with auto-refresh polling, expandable list, and session cards showing verdict, token, confidence, and amount
user_interactions: View agent status indicator and stats bar
Browse session cards in the trade feed
Click "show more" to expand feed and reveal older sessions
Click a session card to navigate to session detail

features.name: Portfolio Summary
features.description: Portfolio value, P&L, holdings, and trade history displayed on the home page
user_interactions: View portfolio value card with total value and P&L
View trade history entries with token, side, amount, and P&L
Click trade proof links to navigate to session detail

features.name: Session Detail and Audit Timeline
features.description: Detailed view of a trading session with 5-step audit timeline (Policy, Market, Decision, Check, Execution), expandable steps with reasoning and raw JSON
user_interactions: Expand/collapse each audit step to see reasoning
View raw JSON payload via disclosure

features.name: On-chain Verification
features.description: Verify session data against on-chain records, showing per-step hash match/mismatch badges

features.name: Attestations
features.description: View and submit attestations for trading sessions, requires wallet connection
user_interactions: See connect wallet prompt if not connected

features.name: Wallet Connection
features.description: Connect/disconnect crypto wallet via Privy, displays address and INIT balance
user_interactions: See wallet address and INIT balance after connecting
Disconnect wallet to return to guest state

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Portfolio analytics with cumulative P&L chart, portfolio value chart, verdict distribution pie chart, and confidence histogram
user_interactions: View stat cards (total P&L, portfolio value, win rate, trades)

features.name: Strategy Configuration
features.description: View and edit agent trading policy (max spend, confidence threshold, cooldown, allowed tokens)

known_limitations.issue: Truncated session hashes displayed in feed UI may confuse users or bots into constructing partial URLs
known_limitations.impact: Session detail lookup now supports prefix matching as fallback, redirecting to full hash URL
